name: companies-register
description: Integration for the New Zealand Companies Register API. For registered companies (status 50) use the NZBN as the identifier. For pre-incorporated companies use the UUID.

get_company_details.description: COMP_03: Get full details of a company by UUID or NZBN. For registered companies (status 50) use the NZBN. Returns company status, contacts, annual return info and an ETag. Store the ETag — it is required when filing an annual return.

companyUuid.description: The company identifier. Use NZBN for registered companies (status 50). Use UUID for pre-incorporated companies.

ifNoneMatch.description: Optional ETag from a previous response. If the data has not changed, a 304 is returned saving bandwidth.

etag.description: ETag of this company snapshot. Required as companyDetailsConfirmedCorrectAsOfETag when filing an annual return.

get_company_contacts.description: Get all contacts for a company — addresses, phone numbers and email addresses. Contacts are returned as part of the company record. For registered companies (status 50) use the NZBN. Each contact includes an ID (addressId, phoneContactId, emailAddressId) needed to update it. The returned ETag is required by update_company_contact.

companyUuid.description: The company identifier. Use NZBN for registered companies (status 50). Use UUID for pre-incorporated companies.

physicalOrPostalAddresses.description: List of physical and postal addresses. Each includes addressId and addressPurpose.

phoneContacts.description: List of phone contacts. Each includes phoneContactId.

emailAddresses.description: List of email addresses. Each includes emailAddressId.

etag.description: ETag for the contacts resource. Required by update_company_contact.

update_company_contact.description: COMP_21: Update an existing contact (address, phone or email) for a company. For registered companies (status 50) use the NZBN. Requires the contactId and etag from get_company_contacts. IMPORTANT for address updates: (1) Do NOT use dpid — provide address lines (address1, address3, postCode) directly. (2) effectiveDate is required for all address updates — use a future date e.g. today + 7 days in ISO 8601 format '2026-03-05T00:00:00Z'. Workflow: call get_company_contacts to get contactId and etag, then call this action.

companyUuid.description: The company identifier. Use NZBN for registered companies (status 50). Use UUID for pre-incorporated companies.

contactId.description: The ID of the contact to update. Use addressId, phoneContactId or emailAddressId from get_company_contacts.

etag.description: ETag from get_company_contacts. Required for concurrency control.

physicalOrPostalAddress.description: Address details. Required when contactType is 'address'. Use address lines only — do NOT include dpid. Include addressId of the address being updated.

addressId.description: ID of the address being updated. Get this from get_company_contacts.

addressPurpose.description: Must match exactly what get_company_contacts returned e.g. 'Registered office address', 'Address for service', 'Address for communication'

countryCode.description: ISO country code. Defaults to NZ if absent.

effectiveDate.description: Required. Future date in ISO 8601 format e.g. '2026-03-05T00:00:00Z'. Use at least today + 7 days for Registered Office Address and Address for Service.

phoneContact.description: Phone details. Required when contactType is 'phone'.

phoneContactId.description: ID of the phone contact being updated.

emailAddress.description: Email details. Required when contactType is 'email'.

emailAddressId.description: ID of the email address being updated.

etag.description: New ETag for the updated contact

add_company_contact.description: COMP_19: Add a new contact (address, phone or email) to a company. IMPORTANT: Each address purpose (Registered Office Address, Address for Service, Address for Communication) can only exist once. If the address already exists, you must use update_company_contact instead — call get_company_contacts to get the addressId and etag, then call update_company_contact. Only one contact can be added at a time. Use search_nz_address first to get a valid dpid for NZ addresses.

companyUuid.description: The company identifier. Use NZBN for registered companies (status 50). Use UUID for pre-incorporated companies.

physicalOrPostalAddress.description: Address details. Required when contactType is 'address'. For NZ addresses provide either dpid OR (address1 + address3).

addressPurpose.description: e.g. 'Registered Office Address', 'Address for Service', 'Address for Communication'

dpid.description: NZ Post Delivery Point ID. Use search_nz_address to find this.

countryCode.description: ISO country code. Defaults to NZ if absent.

phoneContact.description: Phone details. Required when contactType is 'phone'.

emailAddress.description: Email details. Required when contactType is 'email'.

contact.description: Created contact object with assigned ID

search_nz_address.description: COMP_30: Search the NZ Post address file to find a valid address and its DPID (Delivery Point Identifier). Use this before add_company_contact or update_company_contact to get a valid dpid for a NZ address. Searching by dpid overrides all other parameters.

find.description: Address search query (e.g. '23 Wellington Road'). Tokens are split on whitespace and commas.

dpid.description: NZ Post Delivery Point ID. If provided, overrides the find query.

limit.description: Max number of results to return (1-100). Defaults to 10.

postal.description: Set to true to include postal addresses (e.g. PO Boxes). Defaults to false (physical only).

addresses.description: List of matching addresses. Each includes dpid, address lines and postCode.

file_annual_return.description: COMP_23: File an annual return for a registered company. Use NZBN as companyUuid. Requires the ETag from a recent get_company_details call — this acts as confirmation that you have reviewed and the company details are correct as of that snapshot. Phone contact must be Mobile type (used for next year's SMS reminders). Payment defaults to directDebit; use creditCard with a redirectUrl to pay online.

companyUuid.description: The company NZBN (for registered companies, status 50).

declaration.description: The declaration statement text. Use: "I certify that the information contained in this annual return is correct."

name.description: Name of the person filing the return.

emailAddress.description: Email address of the person filing.

designation.description: Role of the person filing. e.g. 'Director' or 'Authorised Person'.

companyDetailsConfirmedCorrectAsOfETag.description: ETag from get_company_details. Confirms company details were reviewed as of that snapshot.

phoneContact.description: Optional mobile phone contact for next year's SMS reminders. Must be phonePurpose: 'Mobile'.

redirectUrl.description: Required when paymentMethod is 'creditCard'. URL to redirect to after payment. Will be base64 encoded automatically.

organisationId.description: Optional. Charge the filing fee to an organisation account instead of the logged-in user.

organisationName.description: Organisation name. Required if organisationId is provided.

annualReturnConsentDocumentRef.description: Optional consent document reference. Required for Co-operatives.

annualReturnShareholderListDocumentRef.description: Optional shareholder list document reference. Required when shareholding is too extensive to submit inline.

documentId.description: Document ID of the filed return (directDebit only)
